data.title: Audit and update bash implementation-plan test files for new SKILL.md sections
data.description:
## Description

Audit bash test files that test implementation-plan SKILL.md for compatibility with the new Proposal Generation and Resolution Loop sections.

**Files to audit**:
1. tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh — grep/awk-based section heading assertions
2. tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-ast-grep.sh — ast-grep integration assertions
3. tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh — SUB-AGENT-GUARD block assertions for implementation-plan

**Audit process**: For each file, check whether assertions:
- Reference step numbers that changed (unlikely — new sections are subsections)
- Use whole-file greps that might false-match on new section content
- Use awk section-scoping that breaks with new adjacent sections

**If compatible**: Document "no changes needed" with evidence (the specific assertions checked).
**If broken**: Update the assertions to match the new SKILL.md structure.

**Cross-story prerequisite**: Stories 68f6-9130, a1f3-db49, 4acd-215a must be complete (SKILL.md must have the new sections).

**Unit test exemption**: Updating grep patterns in test files is structural (no new conditional logic), change-detector-only, infrastructure-boundary. Tests are self-verifying.

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh (audit, update if needed)
- tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-ast-grep.sh (audit, update if needed)
- tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh (audit — likely no changes)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh
- [ ] test-sub-agent-guard.sh passes (implementation-plan assertions)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
